name: startup_indoor_above_cool_nat_vent_not_running
description: Startup: ceiling guard fires before nat-vent can activate

verdict.summary: When startup has indoor exceeding comfort_cool, ceiling guard in production blocks nat-vent activation. Simulator lacks ceiling guard logic.
verdict.observed_behavior: startup with indoor 76F > comfort_cool 74F, sensors open — simulator activates nat vent
verdict.expected_behavior: In production: ceiling guard would block nat vent. In simulator: gap in logic means nat vent activates even with breached ceiling.

events.note: Warm day restart: indoor 76F above comfort_cool 74F, outdoor 68F
Sensor opens: outdoor 68F < indoor 76F, indoor > comfort_heat 70F. In production, ceiling breach would block nat vent. Simulator activates it (gap in ceiling guard).

assertions.reason: Classification applied. In production, comfort ceiling guard would override.

Simulator activates nat vent (no ceiling guard logic). In production: ceiling guard would block because indoor 76F > comfort_cool 74F. Documents gap: simulator needs ceiling guard to block nat vent activation when indoor exceeds comfort_cool.
